query:
SELECT id, address, HEX(SUBSTRING(address, 1, 6)) as hex_prefix
FROM establishments 
WHERE status = 'pending' 
  AND address LIKE 'Rua.%'
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute

FROM establishments 
WHERE status = 'pending' 
  AND address LIKE 'Rua.%'
